title: Jayson Tatum, Celtics look ready for what’s ahead in Game 1 blowout over Sixers: 7 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Boston Celtics As the seconds wound down on the Celtics’ blowout win, fans serenaded the players with a chant of “We want Boston!
We want Boston!
" in a jab at Sixers fans.

title: Nike removes ‘walkers tolerated’ ad from Newbury Street store after blowback
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Boston Marathon The sign that read in large block letters “Runners welcome.
Walkers tolerated," was taken down just days before the Boston Marathon.
Shoppers entering the NIKE store in Somerville.

title: What the Sabres said about Marco Sturm’s message on the Bruins being the ‘more physical’ team
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins “I'm not worried about what they're thinking.
" Marco Sturm and the Bruins are set to take on the Sabres on Sunday night.

John Tlumacki/Boston Globe By Conor Ryan April 19, 2026 | 7:43 PM 3 minutes to read Marco Sturm wasn’t lacking in confidence on Friday when asked what type of tone he wants the Bruins to set once the puck drops on Sunday in Game 1 of Boston’s first-round series against the Sabres.

title: High school student arrested in Lawrence after alleged assault during ‘senior assassin’ game
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News “Senior assassin is not affiliated with or approved by the local school district and typically occurs off school grounds and after school hours,” police said.
By Carson Lyle April 19, 2026 | 7:34 PM 1 minute to read A high school student was arrested in Lawrence last week for an alleged assault linked to a “senior assassin” game, police said.
Three high school students told police that a person shot “BB-style projectiles” at them while they were on a run.

title: Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler says he’s getting death threats ahead of Fenway Park debut
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox “(You’d) think after last time, how much they were talking before, that they might be trying to quiet it down a little bit.
” Cam Schlittler has become a thorn in the side of Red Sox fans.
AP Photo/Frank Franklin II By Conor Ryan April 19, 2026 | 6:03 PM 2 minutes to read Thursday should be an exciting day for Cam Schlittler and his family.

title: MBTA announces service changes, suspensions for various lines throughout May

title: Boston Marathon road closures: Here’s the city’s full list of restricted areas for Monday

bullets: Boston Marathon Thinking of driving around the city on Marathon Monday?
